/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -fsanitize=address -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/acoustics_ui_layout.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/enemy.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/game.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/level_editor.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/leveldef.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/obj_model.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/planetarium/planetarium_registry.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/planetarium/planetarium_validate.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/render.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/settings.c.o CMakeFiles/v_type.dir/src/wavetable_poly_synth_lib.c.o -o VectorSwarm  DefconDraw/libvg.a -lSDL2 /lib/libvulkan.so -lm -lopenmpt -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 /lib/libvulkan.so -lopenmpt -lSDL2_image -lm
